summary: Backend API testing completed successfully (12/12 tests passed). Frontend UI testing blocked by ngrok tunnel instability (520 errors and Metro disconnection). All backend skills endpoints verified working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete login due to ngrok tunnel instability - Metro disconnects (error 1006) preventing button click handling. This is infrastructure issue, not code issue.

issues: CONSOLE WARNING: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. This is a minor deprecation warning.

action_items: Frontend testing blocked by ngrok tunnel instability - needs infrastructure fix or retry when tunnel is stable
Consider adding data-testid to login button for better testability
critical_code_review_comments: Backend skills API implementation is correct: GET/PUT /api/user/skills work as expected
Skills validation correctly filters invalid categories against FAVOR_CATEGORIES
Frontend profile.tsx has proper data-testid attributes for skills components (edit-skills-button, add-skills-button, skill-tag-{name}, skill-select-{name})
Skills state management in profile.tsx is well implemented with proper loading states
API integration uses proper error handling and success alerts
seed_data_creation: Test user skills_test@test.com already exists with skills: Trasporto, Tecnologia, Giardinaggio
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend skills API fully tested and working. Frontend has ngrok tunnel issues causing Metro disconnection. When tunnel is stable, test: 1) Login with skills_test@test.com/test123, 2) Navigate to Profile tab, 3) Click 'Modifica' button (data-testid='edit-skills-button'), 4) Select skills in modal, 5) Click 'Salva' and verify skills persist. Profile.tsx lines 344-401 contain skills UI, lines 643-718 contain skills modal.

infrastructure_issues.ngrok_tunnel: Consistently failing with 'ngrok tunnel took too long to connect' errors
infrastructure_issues.metro_disconnection: Metro bundler disconnects with error 1006 due to tunnel instability
